hero.subtitle: Connect with pre-vetted Admin, Sales, and Design professionals from Pakistan — ready to work remotely for your GCC business at transparent monthly rates.
hero.stat1Label: Average time from registration to active employee

how.label: Process
how.step1Desc: Create your account as an individual or corporate client. Sign the digital contract in Arabic or English — under 2 minutes.
how.step2Desc: Unlock 20 pre-vetted profiles after your 300 AED hiring fee. Listen to voice intros, review skills and experience.
how.step3Desc: Shortlist up to 3 candidates and request interviews. Our team handles scheduling and sends you notifications.
how.step4Desc: Confirm your hire, pay the first month's balance, and your employee is marked Active in your dashboard within 48 hours.

pricing.label: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: All prices in AED per employee per month. A one-time 300 AED hiring fee is credited toward your first month's invoice.

dashboard.label: Client Portal
dashboard.item1Desc: View all active employees, roles, start dates, and performance status. Request replacements or additional hires instantly.
dashboard.item2Desc: Auto monthly billing with downloadable PDF invoices. VAT-ready, AED-denominated, with full payment history.
dashboard.item3Desc: Track interview requests, shortlisted candidates, and hiring progress in real time with notification alerts.
dashboard.item4Desc: Raise tickets across Sales, Billing, Technical, and HR categories. Track resolution status directly in the dashboard.

features.label: Platform Features
features.title: Built for GCC businesses
features.f1Desc: Every candidate records a 1-minute voice intro. Hear communication skills and personality before committing to an interview.
features.f2Desc: Full bilingual support across contracts, dashboard UI, and notifications. Designed for UAE and GCC-based organizations.
features.f3Desc: E-signature with automatic PDF storage. Agreements generated and signed in under 2 minutes, accessible from your dashboard.
features.f4Desc: Stripe-powered card processing with encrypted document storage on AWS S3. Role-based access across your team.
features.f5Desc: Monthly invoices automatically generated in AED with VAT numbers, downloadable as PDF and saved in your billing history.
features.f6Desc: Request additional employees, unlock more candidate batches, or replace staff — all within your existing dashboard.

cta.talentTitle: Looking for a GCC-based remote role?
cta.talentDesc: Apply in under 5 minutes. Upload your CV, choose your category, and record your 1-minute voice intro to get discovered by GCC employers.
cta.clientTitle: Ready to hire your first offshore employee?
cta.clientDesc: Register your company or individual account, sign digitally, and browse your first 20 vetted candidates within the hour.

footer.tagline: GCC's fastest offshore staffing platform. Pre-vetted talent from Pakistan, hired and managed through one clean dashboard.
